title: spell

messages.description: message to convert to ASCII values
the ascii representation of each input digit/character

body: [spell] takes any message and converts each containing digit and character to UTF-8 (Unicode) values ([spell] doesn't understand non-integer float messages). The 1st argument sets the minimum output size. If the input doesn't "spell" to the minimum, the output is filled with characters (32 space character by default and specified by 2nd argument).
